commands.review_summary:
This PR adds CLI subprocess timeout/no-output classification to agent-runner failure replies, regression coverage, and a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main has a source-backed reproduction path: a CLI timeout string reaches buildExternalRunFailureReply with verbose failures off and falls through to the generic chat error; I did not execute a live Telegram timeout in this read-only review.
